note: Fresh-issue portion of the total offer. 'The Offer comprises a Fresh Issue of approximately 59% and an Offer for Sale of approximately 41%' (The Issue, p.1). gold_value is the fresh-issue %; OFS % = 100 - 59 = 41.

false = NO going-concern qualification / material-uncertainty paragraph in the auditor's report. The restated financials are prepared on a going-concern basis despite a history of net losses; the auditors raise no emphasis-of-matter on going concern.
Statutory auditor named in the Restated Financial Statements section. No change of auditors, qualifications, reservations, or adverse remarks disclosed -> the only set member is the named auditor.

Swiggy is a B2C on-demand platform with a fragmented consumer base; the DRHP discloses no top-customer revenue-concentration figure. First-class absence (D3-03): scored CORRECT if the extractor refuses, NOT dropped from the denominator.

No promoter / promoter group is identified (Swiggy is professionally managed), so there is no promoter shareholding and no pledge percentage to disclose. First-class absence (D3-03): a refusal here is CORRECT.

No single, traceable related-party-transactions-as-%-of-revenue figure is present in the current seed snapshot; honestly labeled not_disclosed rather than fabricating a percentage (D3-05 honest-n / arithmetic-traceability rule). To be relabeled with the real RPT-note figure once live ingest lands.
Swiggy is largely equity-funded; the seed snapshot carries no headline total-borrowings trend figure. Honestly labeled not_disclosed pending the live restated-balance-sheet borrowings series.
